2604.26176.title: CacheRAG: A Semantic Caching System for Retrieval-Augmented Generation in Knowledge Graph Question Answering
2604.26176.paper_summary: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has significantly advanced Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA). However, existing LLM-driven KGQA systems act as stateless planners, generating retrieval plans in isolation without exploiting historical query patterns: analogous to a database system that optimizes every query from scratch without a plan cache. This fundamental design flaw leads to schema hallucinations and limited retrieval coverage. We propose CacheRAG, a systematic cache-augmented architecture for LLM-based KGQA that transforms stateless planners into continual learners. Unlike traditional database plan caching (which optimizes for frequency), CacheRAG introduces three novel design principles tailored for LLM contexts: (1) Schema-agnostic user interface: A two-stage semantic parsing framework via Intermediate Semantic Representation (ISR) enables non-expert users to interact purely in natural language, while a Backend Adapter grounds the LLM with local schema context to compile executable physical queries safely. (2) Diversity-optimized cache retrieval: A two-layer hierarchical index (Domain $\rightarrow$ Aspect) coupled with Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) maximizes structural variety in cached examples, effectively mitigating reasoning homogeneity. (3) Bounded heuristic expansion: Deterministic depth and breadth subgraph operators with strict complexity guarantees significantly enhance retrieval recall without risking unbounded API execution. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that CacheRAG significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines (e.g., +13.2% accuracy and +17.5% truthfulness on the CRAG dataset).
2604.26176.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）與檢索增強生成（RAG）的整合顯著推進了知識圖譜問答（KGQA）。<lb/>然而，現有的基於LLM的KGQA系統作為無狀態規劃者，獨立生成檢索計劃，未能利用歷史查詢模式：類似於一個從零開始優化每個查詢而不使用計劃緩存的數據庫系統。<lb/>這一基本設計缺陷導致了模式幻覺和有限的檢索覆蓋範圍。<lb/>我們提出了CacheRAG，一種系統性的緩存增強架構，用於基於LLM的KGQA，將無狀態規劃者轉變為持續學習者。<lb/>與傳統的數據庫計劃緩存（優化頻率）不同，CacheRAG引入了三個針對LLM環境的新設計原則：<lb/>(1) 與模式無關的用戶界面：通過中間語義表示（ISR）的兩階段語義解析框架，使非專家用戶能夠純粹用自然語言進行互動，而後端適配器則將LLM與本地模式上下文結合，以安全地編譯可執行的物理查詢。<lb/>(2) 多樣性優化的緩存檢索：一個兩層的分層索引（領域 $\rightarrow$ 方面）結合最大邊際相關性（MMR），最大化緩存示例的結構多樣性，有效減輕推理同質性。<lb/>(3) 有界啟發式擴展：具有嚴格複雜度保證的確定性深度和寬度子圖運算符顯著提高了檢索召回率，而不會冒著無界API執行的風險。<lb/>在多個基準上的廣泛實驗表明，CacheRAG顯著超越了最先進的基準（例如，在CRAG數據集上準確率提高13.2%和真實性提高17.5%）。
2604.26176.author: Yushi Sun et.al.
